pageContext.name: Xayah
pageContext.description: From the competitive online multiplayer game League of Legends comes the champion Xayah, known as 'the Rebel.' Xayah fights alongside her partner Rakan to protect their tribe, and restore their former glory. Xayah is known for her speed, guilde, and razor-sharp feather blades that she uses to attack at range with deadly efficiency.  The Xayah PVC Figure stands approximately 11.42 inches tall on an appropriately swirling magical base that emulates her spell effects from the game!  Add to your League of Legends collection today!
